rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies and addresses multiple logical inconsistencies in the original output, proposing minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims and marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (minor errors in sentence-level edits).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced.
